## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance change
- [ ] CI, packaging, or repository tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept `metadata.json`, `extension.js`, and `prefs.js` in the extension root.
- [ ] I avoided unrelated behavior changes.
- [ ] I ran `./scripts/check.sh`.
- [ ] I ran `./scripts/package.sh` if packaging could be affected.
- [ ] I completed relevant manual testing from `docs/TESTING.md`.
- [ ] I updated documentation when needed.
